category_sources: source_facts.description says portable version of the Dink Smallwood game engine; GNU FreeDink homepage says it is a portable version of the game engine for Dink Smallwood and D-Mods.
display_name_sources: Official GNU homepage title is GNU FreeDink; source_facts.name is freedink.
docs_sources: Official GNU FreeDink homepage links a Docs page; homepage is also the best available official overview and user surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Savannah CVS page gives anonymous checkout instructions for the freedink source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and GNU homepage describe the Dink Smallwood game engine, RPG/adventure gameplay, portability, and GNU project status.
